title: High court trial starts for Knysna murder accused
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The man accused of murdering...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The man accused of murdering Mawande Kondlo (46), renowned Knysna businessman and owner of Wandu Tours and Stays, in September 2022, made a brief appearance in the George Circuit High Court on Thursday 11 April.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The man accused of murdering Mawande Kondlo (46), renowned Knysna businessman and owner of Wandu Tours and Stays, in September 2022, made a brief appearance in the George Circuit High Court on Thursday 11 April."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The trial was postponed until 19 August.","html":"The trial was postponed until 19 August."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Waydon Bezuidenhout (34) was denied bail on Thursday 8 September 2022 and has been kept in custody in Knysna since."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"An off-duty police official found Kondlo's body at Bokkoppie near the Uniondale Road (R339) on 17 January 2022. His hands and legs were bound with a cloth and he had sustained a wound to his head.","html":"An off-duty police official found Kondlo's body at Bokkoppie near the Uniondale Road (R339) on 17 January 2022. His hands and legs were bound with a cloth and he had sustained a wound to his head."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Bezuidenhout was arrested in August that year after an extensive and intricate investigation by Knysna detectives in collaboration with Garden Route District Crime Intelligence and a private security company that monitors CCTV cameras in Knysna.","html":"Bezuidenhout was arrested in August that year after an extensive and intricate investigation by Knysna detectives in collaboration with Garden Route District Crime Intelligence and a private security company that monitors CCTV cameras in Knysna."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kondlo was a beloved member of the local tourism industry and a pioneer in the development and growth of township tourism in Knysna.","html":"Kondlo was a beloved member of the local tourism industry and a pioneer in the development and growth of township tourism in Knysna."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Bezuidenhout will be represented by Adv Louise Luterek from Mossel Bay.","html":"Bezuidenhout will be represented by Adv Louise Luterek from Mossel Bay."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: High court trial starts for Knysna murder accused
